case_title: LAURA F SANCHEZ et al VS. EVA PETRONA CORDOVA et al

REPLY TO OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO SUPPLEMENTAL INTERROGATORY,SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES,AND INSPECTION DEMAND AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS,AND TO DEFENSE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS;OBJECTIONS TO EVIDENCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ, LAURA F

DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO SUPPLEMENTAL INTERROGATORY, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AND INSPECTION DEMAND, AND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED.  AS TO INTERROGATORY NOS. 1 AND 2, THE RESPONSES ARE INADEQUATE. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND FURTHER. AS TO THE SUPPLEMENTAL INTERROGATORY, DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND FURTHER AND TO VERIFY THE RESPONSE. AS TO INSPECTION DEMAND NOS. 1 AND 2, DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO VERIFY THE RESPONSE AND TO IDENTIFY RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS PREVIOUSLY PRODUCED. FURTHER RESPONSES AND PRODUCTION SHALL BE MADE WITHIN 5 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS MOTION. ALL REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

REPLY TO OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION,OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE FOR AN ORDER DEEMING THE DOCUMENTS ADMITTED GENUINE,AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS;OBJECTIONS TO EVIDENCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ, LAURA F

DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, FOR AN ORDER DEEMING THE DOCUMENTS ADMITTED GENUINE IS GRANTED AS IT SEEKS FURTHER RESPONSES. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND FURTHER WITHIN 5 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. A RESPONSE IS REQUIRED, SETTING FORTH ALL INFORMATION AFTER DILIGENT SEARCH AND REASONABLE INQUIRY. IF DEFENDANT IS UNABLE TO ADMIT OR DENY, RESPOND IN A MANNER ALLOWED BY THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE. THE OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED. ALL REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
